; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
; Modified: 2026-03-24T23:00:59Z

AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
TRAVERSE [[254504370080162629]] > [[8520322697674622449]]#[[17451049988834079337]]
    REPLACE [[233726547792244]] WITH {
        ~&233726547792244&~: !~&11206357713879652003&~.~&496507644976596653&~
    }
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
